description: Semantic grouping of finance slots. A group is the unit of CASCADE detection: a CASCADE requires >=3 slots from the SAME semantic group changing due to one root event (serves C2). Every slot in finance_slots.json belongs to exactly one group.
cascade_eligibility_note: CASCADE requires >=3 slots in the same group changing together. Groups with only 2 slots (credit_config, customer_profile) cannot by themselves satisfy the >=3-slot criterion and are therefore CASCADE-ineligible as single-group cascades.
